name: Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken and lemon juice. Marinate at least 6 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
2. Remove chicken and discard the marinade, reserving 1 tablespoon.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, salt, and pepper. Dredge the chicken in the flour mixture (this step can be skipped).
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Fry the chicken in several batches until golden brown.
5. Transfer the chicken to a baking dish large enough to hold it in a single layer.
6. In a separate bowl, combine lemon slices and brown sugar. Sprinkle over the chicken.
7. Combine the reserved marinade and chicken stock, then pour around the chicken.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes. Serves 4 (generous portions) or 6. Good served hot, even better served cold. Great for picnics.
